steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify task has no dependencies (none declared).

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Create mandatory task folder structure including assets/library/.

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Skipped: Xiong2024 is the only reference and is sufficiently described in the task brief.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Skipped: no new external information required; protocol is already specified in the task description.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Review t0007 scope-unaware Plan-and-Solve library and t0012 ABC smoke harness to identify the v1 entry point and trajectory schema.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Design the v2 library API, two-call protocol, parser, prompts, tests, and 5x3 smoke validation plan.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Skipped: local-only task using Anthropic API (no remote compute required).

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Implement the v2 library, prompts, tests, and run the 5x3 smoke validation with claude-haiku-4-5.

steps.name: teardown
steps.description: Skipped: no remote machines were provisioned.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped: mechanical library extension; the protocol and smoke design are already fixed.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary.md, results_detailed.md, metrics.json, costs.json with smoke validation outputs.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Skipped: this is a library task with no quantitative results comparable to published baselines.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Write follow-up suggestions for downstream tasks (t0023 etc.) based on smoke validation findings.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Run all verificators, capture sessions, set task status to completed.
